title: euphorbia octogona
intro: Euphorbia octogona, also known as the cube-shaped spurge, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Euphorbia octogona include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating pain, as well as possessing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by extracting the sap, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to aid digestion and promote overall well-being.
